name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Ella Visetos🆕New Arrival
Cherry Blossom Pink Mini# Boston Lock Bag 🔒
· Cp Exclusive®️ Full Visetos Print
This mini Ella Boston bag features a light pink design and is a high-end travel bag born during Munich's Golden Age. Its design is inspired by classic suitcases of that era, continuing the travel element design of its leather tag and engraved logo metal lock.
Item No.: H082mini
Model: MWBESEA01CO001
Size: 18*9*9.5cm
Strap: Adjustable 97-113cm
Handle: Drop 8cm
Closure: Zipper
Color: Cherry Blossom Pink/POWER PINK
